testcase.name: test_scan_real_receipt
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_scan_bulk.py:108: in test_scan_real_receipt assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code}: {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: 502: {"detail":"AI scan failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.00118, Max budget: 0.001"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
